message:
feat(beads): add comprehensive streaming test bead (bd-2h0g)

- Created TEST: SDK Streaming Unit/Integration Tests bead
- Covers EventEnvelope canonical encoding, cursor monotonicity
- Covers replay-from-cursor semantics (exact, evicted, FIFO eviction)
- Covers ack semantics (tracking, idempotency, timeout redelivery, batch)
- Covers host<->connector integration (subscribe/receive/ack cycle)
- Includes JSONL logging requirements per 1n78.35
- Includes golden vector specifications

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
